summary: Initialized orchestration state and replaced the original plan's TypeScript package assumptions with a Rust workspace architecture. VS Code and Obsidian clients are constrained to host-required TypeScript/JavaScript glue only; reusable protocol/client logic and all broker/provider/core logic must be Rust.

worker_runs.reason: User added Rust implementation constraint after dispatch.
Worker stayed silent with a live pi process for several minutes; orchestrator proceeded with queue management.

notes: Implementation workers must use the tdd skill.
Verifier workers must be independent from implementers and must not trust implementer claims.
Rust crates may be added through Cargo when justified.
